items.title_en: 16 Chinese science and technology societies jointly advocated for global artificial intelligence governance
items.summary_en: Sixteen science and technology societies affiliated to the China Association for Science and Technology, including the China Society of Automation, China Electronics Society, China Computer Society, and China Artificial Intelligence Society, jointly released the "Global Artificial Intelligence Governance Science and Technology Society Initiative" on April 13, advocating people-oriented, intelligence-oriented, and promoting the establishment of an open, fair, inclusive, and effective global artificial intelligence governance system. The initiative proposes to promote the common welfare of mankind as the fundamental basis for academic research on artificial intelligence; to regard safety as the bottom line requirement for academic research and governance of artificial intelligence; to respect the rights of all countries to equally participate in artificial intelligence research and governance, and to oppose technological hegemony, academic barriers, and exclusive "small circles...

items.title: 全球首届具身智能大会即将启幕，魔法原子将在硅谷发布“世界模型”
items.summary: 4月28日，全球首届具身智能创新大会将在硅谷举行。大会同期聚焦“本体演进”“大脑革命”等议题，图灵奖得主马丁·赫尔曼、魔法生态总裁顾诗韬、OpenMind、英伟达、亚马逊、谷歌等嘉宾与机构受邀参与。据官方信息，魔法原子将现场发布具身智能世界模型、新一代灵巧手及全新人形机器人，完成从AI大脑到执行终端的全栈技术升级。

items.title_en: The world's first Embodied Intelligence Conference is about to kick off, and Magic Atom will release a "world model" in Silicon Valley
items.summary_en: On April 28, the world's first Embodied Intelligence Innovation Conference will be held in Silicon Valley. At the same time, the conference focused on topics such as "Ontology Evolution" and "Brain Revolution". Turing Award winner Martin Hermann, Magic Ecology President Gu Shitao, OpenMind, NVIDIA, Amazon, Google and other guests and institutions were invited to participate. According to official information, Magic Atom will release an embodied intelligent world model, a new generation of dexterous hands and a new humanoid robot on site, completing a full-stack technology upgrade from the AI ​​brain to the execution terminal.

items.title_en: Valued at 250 million, established 4 months ago, trendy Hermès “MOMOTOY” has received tens of millions of yuan in financing
items.summary_en: The capital market’s attention to trendy games has never receded. Recently, 36Kr learned that the AI ​​trendy toy brand "MOMOTOY" has completed tens of millions of yuan in financing, invested by Yipu Fund, with a post-investment valuation of 250 million. After returning to China to undergo root canal treatment on four teeth, the British student Tutu stared at the bill of more than 10,000 and found that he actually saved a second-hand "Tesla" during his return trip.
